data.title: Rush Street Interactive Expands Board with New Appointments
data.description:
An update from Rush Street Interactive ( (RSI) ) is now available.

On March 19, 2025, Rush Street Interactive expanded its board of directors from nine to eleven members, appointing Jack Markell and Andrew Bluhm as new directors. Markell, a former Governor of Delaware and U.S. Ambassador, brings extensive experience in government and corporate development, while Bluhm, a finance and investment expert, has a background in private equity and real estate. These appointments are expected to strengthen RSI’s strategic direction as it continues to expand its presence across the Americas.

More about Rush Street Interactive

Rush Street Interactive, Inc. (RSI) is a prominent online gaming and sports entertainment company with a focus on markets in the United States, Canada, and Latin America. Through its brands BetRivers, PlaySugarHouse, and RushBet, RSI offers real-money mobile and online operations in multiple U.S. states and international markets. Founded in 2012, RSI has received numerous awards for its services and was the first U.S.-based online casino and sports betting operator to receive RG Check iGaming Accreditation from the Responsible Gaming Council.

YTD Price Performance: -19.07%

Average Trading Volume: 2,076,146

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $2.43B

data.title: Siemens Energy Announces Change in Voting Rights Structure
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Siemens Energy ( (DE:ENR) ).

Siemens Energy AG has announced a change in its voting rights structure following the acquisition and disposal of shares by Morgan Stanley. The notification indicates that Morgan Stanley now holds 9.50% of the voting rights in Siemens Energy, up from a previous 9.06%. This change reflects Morgan Stanley’s increased influence in the company, which could impact Siemens Energy’s strategic decisions and stakeholder dynamics.

More about Siemens Energy

Siemens Energy AG is a leading company in the energy sector, primarily focused on providing solutions for the generation, transmission, and distribution of electrical power. The company is based in Munich, Germany, and operates globally, offering a wide range of products and services to support the energy transition and enhance energy efficiency.

data.title: TSH Resources Berhad Executes Strategic Share Buy-Back
data.description:
TSH Resources Bhd. ( (SG:TSH) ) has issued an announcement.

TSH Resources Berhad announced a share buy-back involving the purchase of 550,000 shares at prices ranging from 1.200 to 1.220 Malaysian Ringgit, with a total consideration of 669,028.66 MYR. This move increases their treasury shares to 41,740,200, representing 3.02071% of the total issued shares. The buy-back indicates a strategic effort to consolidate ownership and potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about TSH Resources Bhd.

data.title: Malaysia Smelting Corp. Announces Boardroom Change
data.description:
Malaysia Smelting Corp. Bhd. ( (SG:NPW) ) has issued an announcement.

Malaysia Smelting Corporation Berhad announced the resignation of Mr. John Mathew A/L Mathai from his position as an Independent Director, effective March 22, 2025, following the completion of his nine-year tenure. This change in the boardroom is not expected to impact the company’s operations or its stakeholders, as there are no disagreements or matters requiring shareholder attention.

More about Malaysia Smelting Corp. Bhd.

Malaysia Smelting Corporation Berhad is a company involved in the smelting industry, primarily focusing on the production of tin and other related products. It plays a significant role in the global tin market, providing essential materials for various industrial applications.

data.title: CIE Automotive Announces Shareholders’ Meeting and Dividend Approval
data.description:
CIE Automotive ( (ES:CIE) ) has provided an update.

CIE Automotive has announced the convening of its Ordinary General Shareholders’ Meeting on May 7, 2025, to discuss and approve the annual accounts and management reports for the 2024 fiscal year. Additionally, the resignation of Mr. Shriniprakash Shukla from the Board of Directors due to retirement is noted, alongside the approval of a total dividend distribution of €110,222 thousand and allocation to voluntary reserves.

More about CIE Automotive

CIE Automotive is a company operating in the automotive industry, primarily focusing on the production of automotive components and services. The company is known for its market focus on providing innovative solutions to the automotive sector.

data.title: BEENOS Approves Stock Option Transfers Amid Tender Offer
data.description:
An update from BEENOS ( (JP:3328) ) is now available.

BEENOS Inc. has approved the transfer of several series of restricted stock options to directors and employees, allowing them to participate in a tender offer by LY Corporation. This move is aimed at facilitating the tender offer process, although it does not obligate the holders to tender their options, potentially impacting the company’s ownership structure and stakeholder interests.

More about BEENOS

data.title: Food Empire Secures EBRD Loan for Kazakhstan Facility
data.description:
Food Empire Holdings Limited ( (SG:F03) ) has shared an update.

Food Empire Holdings Limited has secured a US$10 million loan from the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development to fund a new coffee-mix manufacturing facility in Kazakhstan’s Khorgos Special Economic Zone. This facility, the company’s first in Kazakhstan, is expected to create at least 300 jobs and set new standards in the food-processing sector in Central Asia. It will produce instant beverage products, including the flagship MacCoffee brand, with plans to export up to 50% of its output to Central Asia and the Caucasus. The EBRD’s support underscores confidence in Food Empire’s operations and growth potential, reflecting its strategic expansion in the region.

More about Food Empire Holdings Limited

Food Empire Holdings Limited is a multinational food and beverage manufacturing and distribution group headquartered in Singapore. The company offers a diverse portfolio that includes instant beverages, snack foods, and food ingredients, with its products available in over 60 countries across North Asia, Eastern Europe, South-East Asia, South Asia, Central Asia, the Middle East, and North America.

data.title: CWT International Projects Over 400% Profit Increase for 2024
data.description:
CWT International Limited ( (HK:0521) ) has issued an update.

CWT International Limited has issued a positive profit alert for the year ending December 31, 2024, anticipating a profit after taxation of at least HK$300 million, marking an increase of over 400% compared to the previous year. This significant growth is attributed to increased profitability in its logistics services and commodity marketing segments, higher interest income, and the absence of a fair value loss recorded in the prior year.

More about CWT International Limited

CWT International Limited, incorporated in Hong Kong, operates in the logistics and commodity marketing sectors. The company focuses on freight logistics, particularly Full Container Load cargo, and trades in commodities such as copper and gold concentrates.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €98.17M

data.title: Proximar Seafood Releases 2024 Annual Report Highlighting Strategic Milestones
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Proximar Seafood AS ( (DE:84Q) ).

Proximar Seafood AS has released its annual report for 2024, marking a significant milestone in its operations with the first harvest completed in September 2024. The report highlights the company’s strategic advantages, including its location near key fish markets in Japan, which reduces costs and carbon footprint, enhancing its competitive position in the industry.

More about Proximar Seafood AS

Proximar Seafood is a Norwegian company specializing in land-based salmon farming, with its first production facility located at the foot of Mount Fuji in Japan. The company focuses on producing fresh Atlantic Salmon using high-quality groundwater, which allows for same-day harvesting. Its strategic location near major fish markets offers cost and environmental benefits.
